chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ نُوحٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF NOAH<sup>as</sup> ON THE DAY OF JUDGEMENT

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 265)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 265)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ (صلى الله عليه وآله) يَقْسِمُ لَحَظَاتِهِ بَيْنَ أَصْحَابِهِ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى ذَا وَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَى ذَا بِالسَّوِيَّةِ.

en.hubeali: H 14841 – Narrated to me Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Umar Bin Abdul Aziz, from Jameel, who has said:
Abu Abdullahasws has said: ‘The Rasool Allahsaww used to divide hissaww moments between hissaww companions. Hesaww would look at this one, and look at that one equally’.
en.sarwar: 394. Narrated to me Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Umar Bin Abdul Aziz, from Jameel, who has said: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) has said: ‘The Rasool Allah (saww) used to divide his (saww) moments between his (saww) companions. He (saww) would look at this one, and look at that one equally’.
